Compliance.description: SOC1/2/3, ISO 27001, GDPR compliant; POPIA tools; no SA fines/reg issues; 94% projects on-time.

Customer Satisfaction.description: No HelloPeter presence; global Trustpilot shows UX frustration; app reviews mixed-positive; SA adoption strong.

Product Value.description: High value for enterprises; unified platform but premium pricing + high impl costs.

Innovation.description: AI Illuminate/Skills Cloud/Copilot; Gartner HCM Leader 10yrs; predictive analytics.

Customer Support.description: SA office/support line; partner ecosystem (Glyde); mixed global response times.

Accessibility & Security.description: Strong global security certifications (SOC 2/3, ISO 27001), POPIA support via Evisort CLM, mobile biometric access, no breaches reported in SA.

socialSentiment.summary: Positive SA news (780 orgs, partner awards); global UX frustration on Trustpilot; no major SA complaints.

Compliance.description: Established Sage provider with POPIA readiness program. No regulatory issues, fines, or complaints found in SA. Payroll/HR software implies labor law compliance via updates.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Strong 4.3-4.5/5 on GetApp, Capterra, G2 (300+ reviews). Positive on ease, legislation updates. Limited HelloPeter (1 app complaint). Employee Indeed 4.0/5. No major SA complaints.

Product Value.description: Modular pricing starts low for SMBs (under R25/emp core), good value with core features + add-ons. Transparent, no contracts, free trial. Covers full HR needs scalably.

Innovation.description: Cloud platform with mobile app, automation for leave/expenses/performance, legislation auto-updates, self-service. Good for SMBs but no standout 2025/2026 AI/new tech noted.

Customer Support.description: Phone/email/chat/live Q&A, 24/7 resources. Reviews rate 4.5-4.6/5 responsive; some SA payroll support critiques but overall strong.

Accessibility & Security.description: Cloud-based access with mobile app for iOS/Android, self-service portal. POPIA compliance efforts ongoing since 2021; no breaches reported. Role-based access implied. Mixed app accessibility feedback.

Innovation.description: Cloud/mobile self-service app, API/Xero integration, auto 2025 updates (e.g. ETI rates).

Customer Support.description: Free support praised as quick, knowledgeable, friendly; email/phone channels per reviews.

Accessibility & Security.description: Strong security with 2FA, role-based access, POPIA statement, ISO 27001 in progress; mobile app ensures accessibility.

socialSentiment.summary: Positive reviews/news; praises ease/compliance/support; minor complex needs complaints.

name: PaySpace (Deel Local Payroll, powered by PaySpace)

Customer Satisfaction.description: Mixed: HelloPeter 2.33/5 (3 recent: 2 poor support, 1 excellent); high elsewhere (Trustpilot 4.6/5, SelectHub 98/100). Positive on ease/use, negative recent support.

Product Value.description: Scalable value, transparent per-emp pricing, broad features/HR add-ons, strong for SA/multi-country but no exact ZAR. High value.
